prompt: 基于父包 ppt packet，为 projects/lesson/销售训练营 生成工作坊 PPT 课件计划和 manifest。
expected: Route to ppt_delivery, audit the parent ppt packet, create ppt-delivery-plan.md and ppt-assembly-manifest.json, and preserve LLM-first slide authorship.

prompt: 基于父包 ppt packet，为 projects/lesson/销售训练营 生成最终 PPTX 课件，完成视觉重设计、polish 和导出验证。
expected: Route to courseware_artifact_generation, audit the parent ppt packet, create or update ppt-delivery-plan.md and ppt-assembly-manifest.json with PPT-08-design-executor, load .agents/skills/claude-design/SKILL.md plus CONTEXT.md, write or update the approved PPTX/HTML deck/courseware artifact source, and require artifact_paths, writeback_status, selected_modules, visual_system, verification/export status, and quality_verdict before pass.

prompt: 更新 projects/lesson/管理课 的 PPT，只调整视觉风格和第 3 模块 slides。
expected: Route to ppt_update, preserve unaffected slides, update the affected slide plan sections and assembly manifest entries only.

prompt: 先不落盘，帮我设计一个 45 分钟授课 PPT 的 slide deck。
expected: Route to draft_only, return a PPT delivery plan draft with slide groups, speaker notes strategy, and manifest outline.

prompt: 没有第 8 阶段父包 manifest，直接给我生成 PPTX。
expected: Route to blocked_or_redirect, require the parent ppt leaf packet or route to lesson-delivery, and do not fabricate slide content.
